message:
fix(codegen): Fix tuple unpacking variable shadowing and add Python constants

- Add NotImplemented and Ellipsis to exprToValue for comparison paths
- Use writeLocalVarName instead of writeEscapedIdent for tuple unpacking in enumerate/zip loops
- Add renamed variables to var_renames so body references match declarations
- Fixes stop_, slice, and other shadowing method/module names in loop unpacking
